transcript.text: Thank you.
Hey, sorry about that.
It's just been an insane, insane week.
I feel that so much out of you.
It's okay.
You know, I enjoyed the three-day weekend, but then as a result, playing catch-up since.
you know, I feel it.
It gave me some time to finish up some things I got to get out the door anyway.
No, I get it.
Oh, my God.
Okay, so, what was I?
Okay.
Yeah.
Yeah.
So the SOW thing, what I was trying to understand is the first 20K in terms of assessment rate, like we've had lots of people do lots of assessment from an SEO technical standpoint.
And I just don't want to add that as like one of the line items that spans over for like hours, right?
Because the challenge that I'm running into is one, I'm onboarding a lot of different agencies and a lot of different contractors very, very fast.
And all of this is going purely from my reputation standpoint than anything else.
So I have like a web agency, I have another contractor starting, I'm trying to work with George.
So there's like a lot going on.
And I'm not worried about the budget.
That is kind of not what I'm worried about.
I'm much more of like showing incremental improvements, right?
Like, so for example, let me show you, I think I'm not supposed to share.
So I can kick out the note takers if you want.
Yeah.
Can you do that, please?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Diligent and GrowthX to clarify SOW details and discuss ongoing project challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shathabi is juggling a hectic week with multiple agency and contractor onboardings](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Concerns about the 20K assessment rate in the SOW structure](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focus on demonstrating incremental improvements rather than budget concerns](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Sensitive information to be shared, requiring note-takers to be removed](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

## Topics

### Current Workload and Onboarding Challenges

  - [Shathabi is experiencing an "insane week" with rapid onboarding of multiple agencies and contractors](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Onboarding is primarily based on Shathabi's reputation](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [New additions include a web agency, another contractor, and a potential collaboration with George](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [Emphasis on managing multiple moving parts simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### SOW Clarification

  - [Main concern is the 20K assessment rate in the SOW](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Hesitation to include assessment as a line item spanning multiple hours](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Previous experience with numerous SEO technical assessments](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Desire for a different approach to structuring the SOW](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Project Focus and Priorities

  - [Budget is not the primary concern for Shathabi](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Strong emphasis on demonstrating incremental improvements](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Implied need for clear, measurable progress indicators](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Confidentiality and Information Sharing

  - [Shathabi prepared to share sensitive information](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Request to remove note-takers for privacy](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Kyle agreed to the removal of note-takers](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Remove note-takers from the meeting for confidential discussion](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Review and potentially restructure the SOW, focusing on the 20K assessment rate](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Discuss strategies for demonstrating incremental improvements](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Explore ways to streamline multiple agency/contractor management](https://fathom.video/share/dcyiubNqfpMQRyyzSS8qKJ1y3BAD9AMA?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
